## What changed

Describe the user-visible or developer-visible behavior.

## Trust boundary

Explain whether this affects recipe execution, hard-validator vetoes, judge parsing/calibration,
external data, or result aggregation.

## Verification

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `pytest --cov`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] No external benchmark data, model weights, secrets, or generated results were committed
